terms.fallback:
TERMS OF ACCEPTANCE AND PRIVACY NOTICE

By proceeding, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms of Acceptance and this Privacy Notice. If you do not agree with any part of this content, you should not continue using the system.

1. PURPOSE OF THE SYSTEM
This system is provided for general use related to digital services, information access, communication, operational routines, and other features that may be made available by the responsible organization. The system may be updated, changed, suspended, or discontinued at any time, with or without prior notice, as permitted by applicable law.

2. USER ACCEPTANCE
By accessing, registering with, or using the system, you agree to comply with these terms, applicable laws, internal policies when relevant, and any additional rules that may apply to specific features or services. You are responsible for ensuring that the information you provide is accurate, complete, and kept up to date whenever necessary.

3. PROPER USE
You agree to use the system in a lawful, ethical, and responsible manner. It is not permitted to use the system to violate laws, rights of third parties, security mechanisms, intellectual property rights, confidentiality obligations, or the regular operation of the platform. Any misuse may result in restriction, suspension, or termination of access, without prejudice to other applicable measures.

4. ACCOUNT AND ACCESS CREDENTIALS
If the system requires login credentials, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your access information and for activities performed under your account, except where prohibited by law. You must notify the responsible organization as soon as possible if you become aware of unauthorized use, suspected compromise, or any security incident involving your account.

5. AVAILABILITY AND LIMITATION
The system is made available on an as-is and as-available basis, subject to maintenance, technical failures, updates, interruptions, limitations of third-party services, and other operational factors. While reasonable efforts may be made to maintain continuity, uninterrupted or error-free operation is not guaranteed.

6. PRIVACY AND PERSONAL DATA
The responsible organization may process personal data when necessary for the provision, maintenance, security, improvement, legal compliance, fraud prevention, communication, customer support, and proper operation of the system, always in accordance with applicable data protection laws. Data processing may include collection, storage, access, use, sharing, retention, anonymization, and deletion, depending on the context and applicable legal basis.

7. CATEGORIES OF DATA THAT MAY BE PROCESSED
Depending on the nature of the system, the data processed may include identification data, contact data, registration data, access logs, device information, usage records, preferences, support history, and any other information voluntarily provided by the user or generated through the legitimate use of the platform.

8. PURPOSES OF PROCESSING
Personal data may be processed for purposes such as enabling access, authenticating users, delivering functionalities, personalizing the experience, responding to requests, sending operational notices, complying with legal or regulatory obligations, protecting rights, preventing abuse, ensuring security, and improving products and services.

9. LEGAL BASES
Whenever required by applicable law, personal data processing will rely on an appropriate legal basis, which may include consent, compliance with legal or regulatory obligations, contract performance, regular exercise of rights, legitimate interests, credit protection, or other lawful grounds permitted under applicable legislation.

10. DATA SHARING
Personal data may be shared when necessary with service providers, business partners, technology vendors, authorities, or other third parties that support the lawful operation of the system, provided that such sharing is limited to what is necessary and subject to contractual, legal, or security safeguards when applicable.

11. DATA RETENTION
Personal data may be retained for the period necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this notice, to comply with legal or regulatory obligations, to resolve disputes, to exercise rights in judicial, administrative, or arbitral proceedings, and to preserve legitimate business and security interests, after which the data may be deleted, anonymized, or securely archived, as permitted by law.

12. INFORMATION SECURITY
Reasonable technical, administrative, and organizational measures may be adopted to protect personal data against unauthorized access, accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, disclosure, or any form of improper or unlawful processing. However, no method of transmission, storage, or processing is completely secure.

13. USER RIGHTS
Subject to applicable law and to the limits established by law, you may have rights related to your personal data, which may include confirmation of processing, access, correction, updating, anonymization, blocking, deletion, portability, information about sharing, information about consent, revocation of consent when applicable, and review of decisions based solely on automated processing, when legally required.

14. CONTACT AND REQUESTS
Requests related to personal data, privacy, access, correction, deletion, or other rights may be submitted through the official channels made available by the responsible organization. Additional information may be requested to verify identity and ensure the security of the request.

15. COOKIES AND SIMILAR TECHNOLOGIES
If applicable, the system may use cookies or similar technologies for authentication, security, performance, analytics, preferences, and functionality. Specific details may be provided in a complementary cookie notice or internal policy, where applicable.

16. CHANGES TO THESE TERMS
These Terms of Acceptance and this Privacy Notice may be revised at any time to reflect legal, operational, technical, or business changes. The updated version may become effective from its publication or from another date indicated by the responsible organization. Continued use of the system after an update may be understood as renewed acceptance, when permitted by law.

17. GENERAL PROVISIONS
If any provision of these terms is found to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will remain in full force to the extent permitted by law. Failure to enforce any provision shall not be interpreted as a waiver of rights.

18. FINAL DECLARATION
By proceeding, you declare that you have read this content carefully and that you are aware of the conditions for use of the system and the general rules applicable to the processing of personal data.

placeholder.name: John Doe
users.deleteConfirm: Remove this user from the current company and system? The user account will not be deleted.
tokens.deleteConfirm: Delete this API token? This action cannot be undone.
tokens.copyWarning: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
connectedApps.revokeDesc: Revoke access for this connected app? The app will no longer be able to make API calls on your behalf.
connectedApps.empty: No connected apps yet. External apps connect via the OAuth flow.
connectedApps.howTitle: How to Connect an External App
connectedApps.howDesc: External applications can request access to your account through the OAuth authorization flow. No manual setup is required on your end.
connectedApps.step1: The external app opens a popup to the authorization URL below.
connectedApps.step2: You log in (if not already) and see the list of permissions the app is requesting.
connectedApps.step3: You choose which company to grant access to and click Authorize.
connectedApps.step4: The app receives a token and can now make API calls on your behalf.
connectedApps.oauthRequest: wants to connect to your account
connectedServices.catalogEmpty: No services available to connect yet. More services will be added soon.
connectedServices.deleteDesc: Remove this connected service? This action cannot be undone.
tokens.maxOperationCountHint: Per-resource operation count caps. Leave empty for no limit.
tokens.permissionsHint: Search permissions defined in this system's roles
users.inviteExisting: User already exists and was invited to this system
users.rolesHint: Search available roles for this system
users.inviteHint: If the user already has an account, they will be invited to this system without creating a new account.
users.channelsReadOnlyHint: Channels can only be changed by the user from their own profile, via a human confirmation link (§8.7).
entityChannels.title: Entity Channels
entityChannels.description: Add email addresses or phone numbers used to sign in and recover your account.
entityChannels.description.local: Add the channels you want to use to sign in. You'll receive a confirmation link on each one after submission.
entityChannels.verifySent: Confirmation sent! Check your email or phone.
entityChannels.requiredHint: At least one verified channel of this type is required
users.error.lastAdminRole: Cannot remove admin role from the last administrator. Assign another admin first.
users.error.lastAdminDelete: Cannot remove the last administrator. Assign another admin first.
dateRange.endBeforeStart: End date must be after start date
company.name: Company Name

files.download.accessDenied: You do not have permission to download this file
cookieConsent.message: This website uses data tracking technology.
cookieConsent.readTerms: Terms of Service & LGPD Privacy Policy
twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Adds a second factor to your login using an authenticator app. You can always fall back to a verified-channel login link if you lose access to the app.
twoFactor.setup.title: Set up authenticator app
twoFactor.setup.intro: Scan the QR code (or copy the setup URI) into your authenticator app, then enter the first code it generates to confirm.
twoFactor.setup.confirmationSent: A confirmation link has been sent to your verified channels. 2FA activates only after you click it.
twoFactor.disable.confirmationSent: A confirmation link has been sent. 2FA remains active until you click it.
twoFactor.loginLink.sent: If a matching account exists and has 2FA enabled, a login link has been sent to your verified channels.
